title: Review round 1: serde Unknown outbound fix
notes:
Confidence: 90% no missed bug. Running out of real complaints: yes. P0/P1/P2 filed this round: 0. The two P4 issues (enum-level doc gap, missing deserialize-then-serialize round-trip for Unknown) are real but cosmetic/coverage concerns, not correctness bugs. The manual serde pattern is sound. The split serialize/deserialize test structure has correct oracle discipline. Labeled issues .5 and .7 as opinion.
Maintainer risk: LOW — The three converted enums (ChatKind, ChatMemberRole, OwnerPresence) are correct: wire strings match spec, Unknown(String) round-trips cleanly, outbound serialization call sites (chat_query, chat_update, presence_status_update) are all correct. No P0 bugs found. Two P1 items filed: (1) missing Unknown round-trip tests for the three new enums — the PushUrgency test pattern was not replicated; (2) ChatStreamDataType is an outbound enum left on the old unit-Unknown pattern inconsistently.
